The sponsorship deal was revealed on May 29, 2025, by Jet Support Services, Inc. (JSSI) and Neil Book. Day will be competing in the road course events as part of the partnership.
news.headline: JSSI sponsors racing champ Alon Day for 3 ARCA Menards Series events in CT, CA, and NY.

news.summary: A new franchise of a mortgage brokerage company is opening in Cypress and is holding a live ribbon-cutting event on May 29, 2025. The event will feature food, drinks, entertainment, and opportunities to win exciting prizes. Motto Mortgage is known as the first and only national mortgage brokerage.
news.headline: Motto Mortgage DreamNest in Cypress will hold a grand opening on June 7th with ribbon cutting, entertainment, prizes.

news.summary: HP Inc (NYSE: HPQ) released its second-quarter earnings report, which fell below expectations. The company generated $13.22 billion in revenue, surpassing analyst forecasts of $13.15 billion. Despite this, HP's adjusted earnings for the quarter were at 71 cents per share, missing the estimated 80 cents per share. CEO Enrique Lores highlighted the solid revenue growth, especially in Personal Systems, and the continuous progress in their future of work strategy. HP anticipates third-quarter adjusted earnings to range between 68 cents and 80 cents per share. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.
news.headline: Analysts cut HP forecasts after it reported Q2 revenue of $13.22B (above $13.15B est.) and earnings of 71 cents per share.

Israel has announced that it would create 22 settlements in the occupied West Bank, the biggest expansion in decades, has been criticised by UK officials. This expansion also includes legalizing of several that were built as outposts built without government authorization.

(NYSE: FE) revealed that the Foundation has already disbursed over $2 million in the initial two quarters of the year.
news.headline: FirstEnergy Foundation donates $2M to nonprofits in first half of 2025, seeks new leader. Company located in Akron, Ohio.

news.summary: Drawing on over 25 years of expertise in intricate financial affairs, Cowie is aiding organizations in extracting value and maneuvering through crucial transformations. In an announcement made in New York on May 29, 2025, Paladin Management, a middle-market advisory company focused on enhancing value through financial and strategic guidance, highlighted Cowie's role.

news.summary: In Dallas on May 29, 2025, the Supreme Court made a decision to uphold the Trump-era ban on transgender individuals serving in the military. This has sparked new discussions on personal liberties, confidence in governmental bodies, and the influence of gun rights proponents in societal matters. The ruling now allows the ban to be enforced, potentially affecting a significant number of transgender service members.
news.headline: Supreme Court allows Trump's transgender military ban to proceed, sparking debates about personal freedoms and gun rights.

news.summary: A report titled "Medical Cannabis Market - Global Industry Size, Share, Trends, Opportunity, and Forecast, 2020-2030F" has been included in ResearchAndMarkets.com's offerings. The Medical Cannabis Market was worth USD 28.54 billion in 2024 and is projected to hit USD 87.41 billion by 2030, with a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 20.51%. The notable expansion is supported by augmented government investments, an uptick in research and development endeavors, and wider acknowledgment of medical cannabis.
news.headline: Global medical cannabis market valued at USD 28.54 Billion in 2024 to reach USD 87.41 Billion by 2030, with a CAGR of 20.51%.

news.summary: In Farmingdale, New York on May 29, 2025, BEDGEAR®, a leading company in the sleep industry known for its innovative solutions for individuals seeking to Wake Ready®, celebrated the recognition of its Founder/CEO, Eugene Alletto, who was honored as the 2025 recipient at the American Cancer Awards.
news.headline: BEDGEAR CEO Eugene Alletto recognized by American Cancer Society at 2025 gala that raised $500,000.

news.summary: A new terminal has been launched in New York on May 29, 2025, named Stable Sea, offering deep liquidity, real-time foreign exchange services, and compliant stablecoin conversion. This initiative aims to enhance stablecoin utility for fintechs and global businesses facing challenges in accessing these services. The company's flagship product is now available for use, providing access to these essential features.
news.headline: Stable Sea launches Terminal for businesses, offering global stablecoin management with deep liquidity and real-time FX.

news.summary: Sportiqe, a renowned global lifestyle apparel brand recognized for its superior comfort and quality, revealed on May 29, 2025, its official sponsorship of Major League Pickleball (MLP by DoorDash). Sportiqe will serve as the league's dedicated apparel partner, providing attire for athletes.
news.headline: Sportiqe partners with Major League Pickleball, providing apparel for athletes. Official sponsorship of MLP by DoorDash.

news.summary: A recent announcement from First Tech Federal Credit Union unveiled the launch of a new initiative as part of the First Tech Beyond program, aimed at honoring the achievements of up-and-coming tech enterprises and tech-focused nonprofit organizations. The initiative, titled "Spotlight on Tech," was revealed in SAN JOSE, Calif., and HILLSBORO, Ore., on May 29, 2025. This program serves as a platform to showcase the remarkable work of emerging tech firms and nonprofit organizations in the tech sector.
news.headline: First Tech FCU launches Spotlight on Tech initiative to celebrate emerging tech companies and nonprofits. May 29, 2025.

The event showcased the accomplishments of innovative individuals and organizations leading change in various industries.
news.headline: 2025 Globee® Awards for Disruptors winners announced in San Francisco, honoring innovators and game-changers.

news.summary: Excitement is soaring as Albatross in Edison, New Jersey will unveil its grand opening extravaganza on Wednesday, June 18, 2025, from 11am to 2pm. As the world's largest indoor-themed mini putting destination, Albatross promises unparalleled fun and luxury to visitors. Get prepared to experience a leisurely escape like never before at this incredible venue.
news.headline: World's largest indoor-themed mini putting & luxury bowling destination, Albatross, opens June 18, 2025 in Edison, NJ. Grand opening on June 18 from 11am to 2pm.

news.summary: In May 29, 2025, Beal Bank USA was awarded the Marine Money Offshore Bank Debt Deal of the Year for 2024. The bank had initially awarded $275,000,000 in financing to Eldorado Drilling, based in Oslo, Norway, in February 2024. This prestigious recognition highlights the successful partnership and financial transaction between the two entities.
news.headline: Beal Bank USA wins Marine Money Deal of the Year Award for 2024 after providing $275,000,000 financing to Eldorado Drilling.

news.summary: In Vacaville, California, the 2025 Toyota GR Corolla is now available for test drives at Ammaar's Toyota Vacaville. Experience the power and style of the 2025 Toyota GR Corolla today!

news.summary: Phoenix-based tech company Uplinq has successfully secured $10 million in Series A funding to expand its AI-driven bookkeeping and tax automation services for small businesses nationwide. The funding round was spearheaded by Next Coast Ventures.
news.headline: Uplinq raises $10M Series A to expand AI-enabled bookkeeping and tax services for SMBs in the US with Next Coast Ventures.

news.summary: Atlanta-based private equity firm Terminus Capital Partners has successfully closed its first fund, Terminus Capital Partners I, at its hard cap of $250 million. The fund attracted a diverse group of investors such as endowments, funds of funds, and institutional wealth managers, making it oversubscribed. In just under three months, investor commitments were secured for the fund, which was established in 2017. Terminus Capital Partners specializes in investing in business software companies.
news.headline: Terminus Capital Partners closes Fund I at $250 million hard cap, over-subscribed in under three months, focuses on software companies.

news.summary: Burlington Stores, Inc. (NYSE: BURL) saw a rise in their shares on Thursday following the release of their first-quarter financial results. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of $1.60, surpassing the analyst consensus of $1.41. Despite this, quarterly sales of $2.50 billion fell short of the expected $2.52 billion. Total sales experienced a 6% increase compared to the previous year, while comparable store sales remained steady. CEO Michael expressed concerns about the impact of tariffs on merchandise margins but remains optimistic about mitigating this pressure elsewhere in the profit and loss statement. Reference: Benzinga.com
news.headline: Burlington beats Q1 earnings with $1.60 EPS (above $1.41 estimate), $2.50 billion sales (below $2.52 billion view), 6% increase in total sales. CEO vows to absorb tariff pressures through gains.

This patent-pending technology has the potential to save numerous lives in critical situations.
news.headline: Inventor creates AIRPLANE SAFETY SYSTEM to save lives in crashes, incorporates two-part emergency system.

news.summary: On May 29, 2025, Safe Horizon, a prominent victim service organization in the U.S., unveiled its updated brand identity after more than ten years. This refresh signals a major change for the organization as it seeks to adapt to the current landscape of victim services. Safe Horizon is recognized as a key player in supporting victims and has been at the forefront of this mission for years. The new brand identity is the first notable change in a decade and showcases the organization's commitment to evolving with the needs of victims. This announcement comes during a time when victim service providers nationwide are facing increasing demand for their assistance.
news.headline: Safe Horizon launches campaign to challenge violence culture & updated brand identity after a decade. #SafetyIsHumanRight

Generative AI, with its extraordinary capabilities, has been recognized as the primary force driving this market evolution.

news.summary: Conover, North Carolina - On May 29, 2025, Homegrown Family Foods issued a recall for its Shore Lunch Oven Style Breading & Batter Mix in 6oz boxes. This recall was initiated due to the presence of undeclared milk in the product. People who have allergies or extreme sensitivity to milk are at risk of facing severe or life-threatening allergic reactions if they consume this product. It is crucial for individuals who may have purchased this item to be aware of the recall to prevent any potential health risks.
news.headline: Homegrown Family Foods recalls 6oz Box of Shore Lunch Oven Style Breading & Batter Mix due to undeclared milk.
